rows.label: tev061201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev061201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Warawa about NLA.

rows.label: tev061201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev061201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Warawa if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev061201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Warawa about the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev061201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Warawa about the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Warawa used to just wither
away in forgotten cave because
dadapon say it safer there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Compared to that place, human city of
friend is so big and beautiful and
peaceful! Warawa never feel so free![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Warawa has to make up for so
many days being kept cooped up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0004
rows.name:
So Warawa is making sure to enjoy
every day here twice as much.
Hurray for friendship treaty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Before, Warawa could have all Warawa
wanted, because money made world go round.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0009
rows.name:
But in city of friend, Warawa
has finally found something
that money cannot buy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0010
rows.name:
And that something is complete Miralife Card
collection! Warawa never knew of trading card
concept until human friends came along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0011
rows.name:
Come back later if friend
wants to know more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0012
rows.name:
By then, Warawa will finally
have gold card to rub in face
of friend! Oh-ho-ho-hooooo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0013
rows.name:
Warawa often passes time
by thinking up stories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0020
rows.name:
So Warawa tried offering Ma-non
huge sum of money to build machine
that can make stories come true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0021
rows.name:
But Ma-non laughed Warawa right out
of room. Can friend believe it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0022
rows.name:
Mmmrrr... Ma-non had some nerve turning
nose up at such brilliant idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Clearly Ma-non have no
vision OR tact. Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0028
rows.name:
One hobby of Warawa is spending time
with prince who live inside dreams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0029
rows.name:
But if Warawa while away too many hours sleeping,
Warawa will stop eating and bathing—and eventually
whole pampered existence will come tumbling down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Thankfully, Warawa manage to convince
Ma-non to create machine that allows
sleeping and bathing AT SAME TIME![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0031
rows.name:
Now Warawa can take bath with
dream prince! So scandalous!
...But heavenly. ...But scandalous![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Warawa about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Look! Just LOOK how shiny gold
nopopotamus card of Warawa is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Many thanks, friend! Warawa will care
for this so long as body draws breath.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Warawa will sleep with it, and
bathe with it, and give it attention
from morning to night, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Hmm? That will get card dirty? Nonsense!
Warawa has flexed considerable financial muscle
to order sturdy custom sleeve for card.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Not even millesaur or
Hyper-Railgun can break it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0040
rows.name:
Did friend try making recipe
from mamapon of Warawa?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0041
rows.name: ...Mo? Not yet? Mo! What is holdup?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061201_MSG0042
rows.name:
Warawa cannot stand people who
give up halfway. Friend must
finish what friend has begun![ST:wait ]
